decision_letter:
Dear Applicant (ID: APP-001),

We are pleased to inform you that your loan application has been approved. We appreciate your interest in our financial services.

Based on our assessment, you have been approved for a loan amount of $25,000 at an annual interest rate of 7.5%. Detailed terms, including the repayment schedule and agreement documentation, will be provided to you by a dedicated loan officer in the coming days. Please anticipate further communication outlining the next steps to finalize your loan agreement.
